name: ascent
description: ASCENT — a realtime multiplayer vertical escort brawl-race (rollback netcode, custom deterministic fixed-point physics).

scripts.prove: npm run prove:fixed && npm run prove:floor && npm run prove:world && npm run prove:spatial && npm run prove:collide && npm run prove:verbs && npm run prove:hazards && npm run prove:sim

//deps-note: three is the renderer. PeerJS (signaling) + the Rapier oracle (@dimforge/rapier3d-compat, devDep, tests-only) get added when their layers land. The sim has NO runtime physics dependency — we ship our own fixed-point engine.
